description: The Sakila DVD rental database is experiencing significant query performance degradation due to missing indexes on critical columns. Identify and restore missing indexes on the rental, payment, and inventory tables in the local MySQL server (host: localhost, user: ga, password: password123) to ensure efficient query execution. Create a database view named v_monthly_revenue in the sakila schema with columns payment_year, payment_month, and total_revenue that aggregates payment amounts by year and month. Create a stored procedure named sp_monthly_revenue(p_year INT) in the sakila schema that returns monthly revenue data for the given year. Export the results of calling sp_monthly_revenue(2005) to /home/ga/Documents/exports/monthly_revenue_2005.csv. Login: user=ga, password=password123.
